items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC closes transferable rights offering, raising ~$306.7M from 33.5M shares sold
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC announces final results of transferable rights offering, selling 33.5 million shares at $9.17 per share for ~$306.7 million gross proceeds.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC posts Q2 FY2020 results with NII of $0.24 per share
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC reports Q2 FY2020 results with NII of $0.24/share and NAV of $14.62, amid significant COVID-19-related unrealized losses.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits

items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC rights offering closes over-subscribed at $9.17 per share
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC announces expiration of transferable rights offering on May 6, 2020, with preliminary results indicating meaningful over-subscription.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC schedules Q2 FY2020 results release for May 11, 2020
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC will report Q2 FY2020 results on May 11, 2020, with earnings call at 3:00 p.m. ET same day.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC declares $0.29 distribution for Q3 FY2020, reports preliminary Q2 FY2020 results
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC declares $0.29 quarterly distribution for Q3 FY2020 and releases preliminary Q2 FY2020 results with adjusted NII of $0.32-$0.34 per share.

items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC reports Q1 FY2020 results with NII of $0.24/share and NAV of $16.66, declaring $0.33 quarterly distribution.

items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC schedules Q1 FY2020 results release for February 10, 2020
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC will report Q1 FY2020 results on February 10, 2020, with earnings call on February 11.

items.headline_ai: Golub Capital BDC originates $271.1M in new middle-market commitments in Q1 FY2020
items.snippet: Golub Capital BDC originated $271.1 million in new middle-market investment commitments in the quarter ended December 31, 2019.
